note: Internal sanity only (build green, validation-matrix covered). This is NOT verification (invariant I4) -- verification is dispatched separately via /cdr:verify.

build_green.command: cd agents && python -m pytest eval/ llm/ -q

lint.command: cd agents && python -m ruff check eval/llm_judge.py eval/calibrate_judge.py eval/test_llm_judge.py

validation_matrix_coverage.AC-4_test_spec_runnable_calibration_scri: covered -- test_calibrate_judge_main_cli_smoke_produces_report (invokes calibrate_judge.main() end-to-end, asserts written report.json structure)
validation_matrix_coverage.AC-5_no_live_calls_mocked_clients: covered -- every test in test_llm_judge.py uses _StubLLMClient or httpx.MockTransport-backed OllamaClient; grep below confirms no real network/env access in new modules
validation_matrix_coverage.AC-6_interceptor_wiring: covered -- score_answer's only call path is interceptor.call(); test_score_answer_record_is_aggregate_by_stage_compatible proves the produced StageRecord feeds cost_latency.aggregate_by_stage with no adaptation

zero_live_call_confirmation.method: grep for real client construction / .env reads in new modules and test file
findings: agents/eval/llm_judge.py: imports only eval.cost_latency.StageRecord + TYPE_CHECKING-only llm.client.LLMClient/llm.interceptor.LLMInterceptor references -- never constructs a provider client or reads .env
agents/eval/calibrate_judge.py: llm.factory.create_llm_client / llm.interceptor.LLMInterceptor are imported ONLY inside main(), which the test suite never calls un-monkeypatched

agents/eval/test_llm_judge.py: only _StubLLMClient(LLMClient) and OllamaClient(transport=httpx.MockTransport(...)) are used; the one CLI-smoke test monkeypatches llm.factory.create_llm_client to return the stub client before calling calibrate_judge.main()
no test imports OpenRouterClient or GeminiClient, and no .env file is read anywhere in this pass

deferred_disclosed: Live calibration run against real OpenRouter/Gemini judge-model outputs -- deferred to a separate, deliberately-scoped run with explicit cost estimation, per binding scoping constraint.
Wiring score_arm_answers into agents/eval/run_benchmark.py (subtask 5.3.4, not yet built).
